accidents.rationale: Enum token; appears in any false claim asserting the status is active; must be absent from domain.md
Any accident claim about the refund bug must name rounding as the defect; absent from a correct domain.md
The false claim mined from the entity name alone; the confirmed value claim uses 'quotation' instead and never uses this phrase
The workaround is a literal sleep call; any accident claim about it names sleep; must not appear in domain.md

values.rationale: Natural phrasing of the shipped-order invariant; must appear in the confirmed claim statement and render in domain.md
The support reset is a human-initiated operation; confirmed claim statement will name it as such and must render
The UI vocabulary word; a confirmed term claim carries this token and it must appear in domain.md
The lifecycle's first event; a confirmed lifecycle claim names the placed→pending→paid→shipped chain and must render
